title: Thermoplastic unidirectional tape with discontinuous coating layer
abstract: Described herein are unidirectional tapes and methods of making thereof. The unidirectional tapes disclosed herein include a unidirectional fiber layer and discontinuous coating layer that includes a plurality of discontinuous coating regions on at least one side of the unidirectional fiber layer.
claims:
Claims Attorney Docket No.28162-20001.40 CLAIMS 1. A unidirectional tape comprising: a unidirectional fiber layer comprising a plurality of unidirectional fibers and a first polymer; and a a discontinuous coating layer comprises a plurality of discontinuous coating regions on at least one side of the unidirectional fiber layer, wherein the discontinuous coating layer comprises a second polymer. 2. The unidirectional tape of claim 1, wherein the discontinuous coating layer covers 5- 75% of a surface area of the at least one side of the unidirectional fiber layer. 3. The unidirectional tape of any one of claims 1-2, wherein a thickness of the unidirectional tape has a coefficient of variation (CoV) of 5-50%. 4. The unidirectional tape of any one of claims 1-3, wherein the first polymer and/or second polymer comprises polyarylether ketone-based polymeric material, polyphenylene sulfide (PPS), polyethersulfone (PES or PESU), polyethylenimine (PEI), or combinations thereof. 5. The unidirectional tape of any one of claims 1-4, wherein the first and second polymers are the same. 6. The unidirectional tape of any one of claims 1-5, wherein the plurality of unidirectional fibers comprises carbon fibers, glass fibers, or combinations thereof. 7. The unidirectional tape of any one of claims 1-6, wherein the discontinuous coating layer comprises conductive additives. 8. The unidirectional tape of claim 7, wherein the conductive additives comprise carbon particles. 9. The unidirectional tape of claim 8, wherein the carbon particles have a mean diameter of a volume distribution of 10-50 microns. 10. The unidirectional tape of claim 8, wherein the discontinuous coating layer comprises 2-10 wt.% carbon particles. 

 Attorney Docket No.28162-20001.40 11. The unidirectional tape of any one of claims 1-10, wherein the unidirectional fiber layer comprises conductive additives. 12. The unidirectional tape of claim 11, wherein the conductive additives comprise carbon black, graphene, carbon nanotubes (CNT), milled carbon fiber, milled carbon fiber prepreg, or combinations thereof. 13. The unidirectional tape of claim 11, wherein the conductive additives have a mean diameter of a volume distribution of 20 nanometers to 1 micron. 14. The unidirectional tape of claim 11, wherein the unidirectional fiber layer comprises 0.1-10 wt.% conductive additives. 15. A method of producing a unidirectional tape comprising: preparing a unidirectional fiber layer comprising a plurality of unidirectional fibers and a first polymer; discontinuously coating at least one side of the unidirectional fiber layer with a plurality of particles comprising a second polymer; heating the plurality of particles such that the plurality of particles coalesce into a plurality of discontinuous regions on the at least one side of the unidirectional fiber layer; and pressing the at least one side of the coated unidirectional fiber layer to form the unidirectional tape. 16. The method of claim 15, wherein the plurality of particles have an average particle diameter of 5-500 microns.
